description: Schema-level contract for provider-aware reporting profiles used by the LocalAI worker-mode benchmark suite.
rules: Provider-backed reports must identify the cycle, infrastructure profile, provider binding, validation profile, deployment profile, placement profile and minimal observability profile.
Reports must preserve fixed and varied dimensions for every sweep family.
Unsupported scenarios must be reported explicitly and must not be interpreted as measured performance regressions.
Reporting and diagnosis profiles must use campaignResultsRoots as the canonical measurement-root map.
Report titles, sweep titles, reporting identifiers and UTC timestamps must be generated with a uniform cycle-aware editorial pattern across C0-C6.
Generated at UTC values must use second-level ISO-8601 UTC format with Z suffix.
